spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-First PWA, Bottom Nav for quick actions on mobile.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-[#E2E0D8] rounded-xl shadow-sm p-4 sm:p-6

buttons.floating_action: fixed bottom-6 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-[#2B4C3B] text-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 transition-transform

inputs.style: bg-transparent border border-[#E2E0D8] rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2B4C3B]/20 focus:border-[#2B4C3B] transition-all px-4 py-2

badges.active: bg-[#3A7D44]/10 text-[#3A7D44] border border-[#3A7D44]/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium
badges.pending: bg-[#F5A623]/10 text-[#F5A623] border border-[#F5A623]/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium
badges.suspended: bg-[#D04238]/10 text-[#D04238] border border-[#D04238]/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium

login.layout: Centered card on #F5F4F0 background. Left side visual (if desktop), full screen mobile.
login.features: Mobile/Email input, OTP/Password, clear PWA install prompt if supported.

business_dashboard.top_section: North Star Metrics: Total Received, Total Pending. Large typography for ₹ amounts.
business_dashboard.quick_actions: Horizontal scrollable list of circular/rounded-rect quick action buttons (Add Payment, Add Expense, Scan Bill).
business_dashboard.recent_activity: Vertical list of recent transactions with clear red/green color coding for money in/out.

projects_detail.tabs: Scrollable horizontal tabs for Overview, Transactions, Extra Work, Stages, Materials, Docs, Reminders.
projects_detail.layout: Sticky header with project name and status. Content scrolls below.

bill_scanner.ui: Camera view overlay, bottom sheet for crop/enhance/compress actions.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit', data-testid='add-project-btn').

image_urls.description: brown pencil on white printing paper, perfect for subtle interior design background
A blueprint of a building with a bunch of windows for empty state screens

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes matching the organic & earthy color palette.
Format currency using Indian numbering system (e.g. ₹1,25,000) using Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR' }).
Prioritize mobile layout (p-4, vertical stacks). On desktop, expand into a 2/3 column bento grid.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for main layouts and Shadcn for functional components (Dialogs, Tabs, Forms).
Implement a sticky bottom navigation bar for mobile with quick access to Home, Projects, Scan Bill, Reminders, Profile.
Never use generic blue. Stick to the #2B4C3B (Deep Forest Green) and #D96C4A (Terracotta) accents.
All cards must have a 1px border (#E2E0D8) and soft shadow.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every button, input, and interactive tab.
